title: muhlenbergia clandestina
intro: Muhlenbergia clandestina, also known as False Muhly Grass or Desert Muhly, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia clandestina include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
